values.description: Provider NP (BPP) endpoint. Set to BPP sandbox / staging / integration URL.
Requesting NP (BAP) callback URI. Set to BAP sandbox endpoint.
Provider NP (BPP) URI. Used for on_* callback simulations.
Network registry / CDS URL for catalog/publish.
Network-issued JWT — obtain from network registry before running.
Domain prefix — confirm exact value with network team before going live.
Network ID — confirm exact value with registry team. Format: namespace/registry.
Requesting NP network identifier (appears as bapId in Beckn context).
Provider NP network identifier (appears as bppId in Beckn context).
UC1 transaction UUID — regenerate for each test run.
UC1 contract UUID — assigned by Provider NP at on_select.
